headline: Is It Too Late To Consider TJX Companies (TJX) After A 32% One Year Rally?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether TJX Companies at around US$157.57 still offers value, or if the easier gains on this stock have already been realized. Over the past year the share price delivered a 32.3% return, with shorter term moves of 1.9% over 7 days, a 0.1% decline over 30 days, and a 2.1% return year to date. These shifts can hint at changing views on its growth potential and risk. Recent coverage has focused on TJX Companies as a major off-price retailer in a competitive U.S...
